title: UK Will Not Join U.S. Blockade of Strait of Hormuz, Starmer Says
summary_full: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the U.K.’s diplomatic efforts are directed at keeping the vital waterway “open, not shut.”
summary_public: Prime Minister Keir Starmer said the U.K.’s diplomatic efforts are directed at keeping the vital waterway “open, not shut.”

GB.label: neutral
